english translation text:
Go to sajdah and
recite as follows

arabic text: يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا اللَّهُ
english translation text: O Allah! O Allah! O Allah!

arabic text: يَا رَبُّ يَا رَبُّ يَا رَبُّ
english translation text: O Lord-Nourisher! O Lord-Nourisher! O Lord-Nourisher!
O He Who sends down blessing!
To You only are all desires turned.

arabic text: اَسْاَلُكَ بِكُلِّ ٱسْم فِي مَخْزُونِ ٱلْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ
english translation text: I beseech You in the name of every name treasured in Your invisible collection,
and in the name of Your celebrated names,
inscribed on the hangings of Your Throne,

arabic text: اَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
to accept my offerings made in the month of Ramadan,

arabic text: وَتَكْتُبَنِي مِنَ ٱلْوَافِدينَ إِلىٰ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ
english translation text: to record my name in the list of those who will journey to Your Sacred House,

arabic text: وَتَسْتَخْرِجَ لِي يَا رَبِّ كُنُوزَكَ يَا رَحْمٰنُ
english translation text: to demonstrate, O Lord, before me Your treasures, O All-beneficent!

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
